title: NIT Andhra Pradesh Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
organization: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh
short_info: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh (NIT Andhra Pradesh) Adhoc Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitandhra.ac.in. A total of various vacancies have been announced through the NIT Andhra Pradesh Adhoc Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent in respective branches, or Ph.D. for some positions.
qualification.details: Adhoc Faculty in Civil Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Chemical Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Computer Science and Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Electrical Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Electronics & Communications Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Mechanical Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering: B.Tech/B.E. (First Class) and M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent (First Class) in respective branch or allied branches. Adhoc Faculty in Biotechnology: B.Tech. (First Class) and M.Tech. or equivalent (First Class) in Biotechnology, OR B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering (First Class) and M.Tech. in Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering (First Class), OR B.Sc. (First Class), M.Sc. (First Class), and M.Tech in Biotechnology (First Class). Adhoc Faculty in School of Sciences (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry): UG Degree (First Class), PG Degree (First Class) in relevant discipline, and Ph.D.** in relevant or equivalent discipline. Adhoc Faculty in School of Humanities (English): UG Degree (First Class), PG Degree (First Class) in relevant discipline, and Ph.D.** in relevant or equivalent discipline. Adhoc Faculty in Schools of Humanities (Management): B.Tech. (any branch of Engineering) (First Class) and MBA (Full time) (First Class), OR Bachelor's Degree (any discipline) (First Class) with M.Com.* (Full-time) (First Class) and MBA (Full time) (First Class).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Andhra Pradesh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
